reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Principalmente de Oscaldo quien me ayudo a sacar la rueda del auto cuando mi llave no funcionaba correctamente. De hecho, trato de usar una suya de su auto.
Además tiene juegos para chicos y parrillas.
Gracias Osvaldo

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. Especially from Oscaldo, who helped me get the wheel off my car when my key wasn't working properly. In fact, he tried to use one of his own.
He also has children's games and grills.
Thanks, Osvaldo.

reviews.comment:
Comida excelente. Comimos hamburguesas con queso y jamón vienen con papas y gaseosa súper rápido los hicieron. Baños limpios amplios. Siempre hay una señora limpiando súper simpática. Y los playeros muy amables y con buena onda. El agua caliente es gratis .

(Translated by Google)
Excellent food. We had hamburgers with cheese and ham, which came with fries and soda. They were made super fast. The bathrooms were clean and spacious. There's always a super friendly cleaning lady. The beach attendants are very friendly and welcoming. Hot water is free.
